title: TG's clientside
description: A Modpack aiming to not change the game at all! Kinda
body:
## A modpack full of Client-side mods!

### Using some mods might ban you from servers, so make sure to read the whole modlist and each server's rules.


I don't own the mods used here, this is the modpack I made mostly for myself, but there are not many clientside centered mod packs out there, so I decided to publish it.
There are not many modpacks out there that aim not to change the game at all, making it usable on servers, but also include useful stuff.

I am not too good at writing descriptions though but here is an overview

it has like 200 clientside mods and uh just test it for yourself and see what it does idk

### One mod specificly (autototem) might get you banned off some servers so make sure to read server rules before joining any server with this modpack
